description_long: This is a squeezable Heinz Kranch sauce bottle, featuring a curvy, ergonomic plastic body with a light peach color. The front displays a large, light blue and white label with the Heinz logo, the product name 'KRANCH', and a visual of the sauce. The back side has a detailed nutrition facts label and barcode, printed in black and blue on a white background. The bottle is topped with a wide, ribbed, white plastic flip-top cap designed for easy dispensing. The surface is glossy and smooth, typical of condiment bottles, and the bottle appears to be filled with a creamy, light orange sauce. There are no visible signs of damage or wear on the exterior.
description: A squeezable Heinz Kranch sauce bottle with a curvy, light peach plastic body, a large front label, and a wide white flip-top cap. The surface is glossy and smooth, and the bottle appears full.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Heinz Kranch label, logo, and product imagery on a light peach bottle with a white cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's curvy profile and the cap, with no visible labels or text.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the nutrition facts label, barcode, and product information on a white background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's profile and cap, similar to view 1, with no labels visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with 'HEINZ' in black on a white background, 'KRANCH' in red and blue, and a sauce swirl graphic. Back label with nutrition facts, barcode, and product information in black and blue on white.
